attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.PRODUCT_FAMILY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.GOAL_LEAD_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW,
 (
 select PRODUCT_FAMILY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW
 minus
 select PRODUCT_FAMILY ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PRODUCT_FAMILY = STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.PRODUCT_FAMILY and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_PF_LT_BMW)
